author: dvcrn
description: Keep the filename with the first heading of a file in sync.

manifest.author: dvcrn
manifest.description: Obsidian plugin for keeping the filename with the first heading of a file in sync
manifest.name: Filename Heading Sync

name: Filename Heading Sync

releases.author: dvcrn
releases.description:
- Add option to specify what characters to replace space with (#62)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dvcrn/obsidian-filename-heading-sync/compare/1.10.3...1.11.0

releases.author: dvcrn
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dvcrn/obsidian-filename-heading-sync/compare/1.10.1...1.10.2

- Fixed an issue where file save would mess with the heading text input (https://github.com/dvcrn/obsidian-filename-heading-sync/issues/110)

releases.author: dvcrn
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add an option to not insert a heading by @EDmitry in https://github.com/dvcrn/obsidian-filename-heading-sync/pull/105

## New Contributors
* @EDmitry made their first contribution in https://github.com/dvcrn/obsidian-filename-heading-sync/pull/105

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dvcrn/obsidian-filename-heading-sync/compare/1.10.0...1.10.1

releases.author: dvcrn
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* ensureFileSaved by @mnaoumov in https://github.com/dvcrn/obsidian-filename-heading-sync/pull/104
* Add timeout option to debounce file renaming by @dvcrn in https://github.com/dvcrn/obsidian-filename-heading-sync/pull/102
* Remove debug logging


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dvcrn/obsidian-filename-heading-sync/compare/1.9.3...1.10.0

releases.author: dvcrn
releases.description:
- Fixes an issue when the folder contained the same name as the file (https://github.com/dvcrn/obsidian-filename-heading-sync/pull/44) @erykwalder
- Adds option to disable the file-open event hook

releases.author: dvcrn
releases.description: - Adds exclusion for excalidraw files (https://github.com/dvcrn/obsidian-filename-heading-sync/issues/37)

releases.author: dvcrn
releases.description:
Improve the handling of illegal characters

- https://github.com/dvcrn/obsidian-filename-heading-sync/pull/30
- https://github.com/dvcrn/obsidian-filename-heading-sync/pull/33

releases.author: dvcrn
releases.description: - Add guard to only trigger on markdown files

releases.author: dvcrn
releases.description:
Merges https://github.com/dvcrn/obsidian-filename-heading-sync/pull/25 (thanks @sveinnthorarins)
- Re-add open file event handler
- Update sync logic to also work when editor is in preview mode

**deprecated due to a bug. use 1.5.1**
releases.name: 1.5.0 (deprecated)

releases.author: dvcrn
releases.description: - Remove file-open handler as it caused data-loss in some cases

releases.author: dvcrn
releases.description: - Fix insertion of headline not being at line 0 (Closes #21)

releases.author: dvcrn
releases.description: - Fix newline insertion when no frontmatter is present

releases.author: dvcrn
releases.description:
- Add support for skipping frontmatter https://github.com/dvcrn/obsidian-filename-heading-sync/issues/4
- Fix issue when filename has the same name as the folder it's in https://github.com/dvcrn/obsidian-filename-heading-sync/issues/17
- Add check when an event is triggered to make sure the current active file is the one that triggered it https://github.com/dvcrn/obsidian-filename-heading-sync/issues/18

releases.author: dvcrn
releases.description: Add option for ignoring files through regex:

releases.author: dvcrn
releases.description: - Add support for stripping custom characters from the sync (https://github.com/dvcrn/obsidian-filename-heading-sync/pull/9)

releases.author: dvcrn
releases.description: # Changelog - Fix links not getting updated on rename - Add support for ignoring files. This is doable through a new "Ignore this file" command - minVersion is now pinned to 0.11, due to that version fixing the link bug
releases.name: Release 1.1.0

releases.author: dvcrn
releases.description: Initial Release
